## 🏛️ Regulatory Framework

Which regulatory framework are you asking about?

- [ ] **NIST 800-53** (Federal Information Security Management Act)
- [ ] **ISO 27001** (Information Security Management)
- [ ] **SOC 2** (Service Organization Control 2)
- [ ] **GDPR** (General Data Protection Regulation)
- [ ] **FedRAMP** (Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program)
- [ ] **SOX** (Sarbanes-Oxley Act)
- [ ] **HIPAA** (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act)
- [ ] **PCI DSS** (Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard)
- [ ] **CCPA/CPRA** (California Consumer Privacy Act)
- [ ] **Other**: [Specify framework]

### **Compliance Context**
- **Organization Type**: [e.g., Federal agency, Healthcare, Financial, Cloud provider]
- **Data Sensitivity**: [e.g., Public, Internal, Confidential, Classified]
- **Assessment Scope**: [e.g., Full system, Component, Process]

**Thank you for your regulatory compliance question!** 🏛️

We'll review your question and provide guidance on how NovaFuse-EGP-VS can support your regulatory compliance needs. For urgent security matters, please contact security@novafuse.ai directly.

**Note**: This is not legal advice. For specific legal compliance requirements, please consult with qualified legal counsel familiar with your jurisdiction and industry.
